2605.19619.title: MiMuon: Mixed Muon Optimizer with Improved Generalization for Large Models
2605.19619.paper_summary: Matrix-structured parameters frequently appear in many artificial intelligence models such as large language models. More recently, an efficient Muon optimizer is designed for matrix parameters of large-scale models, and shows markedly faster convergence than the vector-wise algorithms. Although some works have begun to study convergence properties (i.e., optimization error) of the Muon optimizer, its generalization properties (i.e., generalization error) is still not established. Thus, in this paper, we study generalization error of the Muon optimizer based on algorithmic stability and mathematical induction, and prove that the Muon has a generalization error of $O\big(\frac{1}{Nκ^{T}}\big)$, where $N$ is training sample size, and $T$ denotes iteration number, and $κ>0$ denotes minimum difference between singular values of gradient estimate. To enhance generalization of the Muon, we propose an effective mixed Muon (MiMuon) optimizer by cautiously using orthogonalization of gradient, which is a hybrid of Muon and momentum-based SGD optimizers. Then we prove that our MiMuon optimizer has a lower generalization error of $O\big(\frac{1}{N}\big)$ than $O\big(\frac{1}{Nκ^{T}}\big)$ of Muon optimizer, since $κ$ generally is very small. Meanwhile, we also studied the convergence properties of our MiMuon algorithm, and prove that our MiMuon algorithm has the same convergence rate of $O(\frac{1}{T^{1/4}})$ as the Muon algorithm. Some numerical experimental results on training large models including Qwen3-0.6B and YOLO26m demonstrate efficiency of the MiMuon optimizer.
2605.19619.paper_summary_zh: 矩陣結構的參數經常出現在許多人工智慧模型中，例如大型語言模型。最近，為大型模型的矩陣參數設計了一種高效的Muon優化器，並顯示出比向量算法明顯更快的收斂速度。儘管一些研究已經開始研究Muon優化器的收斂性質（即優化誤差），但其泛化性質（即泛化誤差）仍未確立。因此，在本文中，我們基於算法穩定性和數學歸納法研究Muon優化器的泛化誤差，並證明Muon的泛化誤差為$O\big(\frac{1}{Nκ^{T}}\big)$，其中$N$是訓練樣本大小，$T$表示迭代次數，$κ>0$表示梯度估計的奇異值之間的最小差異。為了增強Muon的泛化能力，我們提出了一種有效的混合Muon（MiMuon）優化器，通過謹慎使用梯度的正交化，這是一種Muon和基於動量的SGD優化器的混合體。然後我們證明我們的MiMuon優化器的泛化誤差為$O\big(\frac{1}{N}\big)$，低於Muon優化器的$O\big(\frac{1}{Nκ^{T}}\big)$，因為$κ$通常非常小。與此同時，我們還研究了我們的MiMuon算法的收斂性質，並證明我們的MiMuon算法具有與Muon算法相同的收斂速率$O(\frac{1}{T^{1/4}})$。一些關於訓練大型模型的數值實驗結果，包括Qwen3-0.6B和YOLO26m，展示了MiMuon優化器的效率。
2605.19619.author: Feihu Huang et.al.
2605.19619.authors: Feihu Huang, Yuning Luo, Songcan Chen
